result.stdout:
<<<-----A CLI for nested zip file extractor----->>>

Usage: ZipUtil [options] <Either relative or absolute path of zip file>

Arguments:
  Either relative or absolute path of zip file  

Options:
  -d|--delete                                   Delete all zip files after
                                                extraction
  -o|--open                                     Open folder after extraction
  -n                                            By default files are overwritten
                                                on extraction if there is any.
                                                Use this option to disable this
  -?|-h|--help                                  Show help information
